mid-swing of notched greatsword trailing arc of crimson mist through crypt air
striding through iron cemetery gates with silver-tipped crossbow lowered and coat dragging
crouched on gargoyle's wing scanning cobblestone plaza below, repeating-crossbow cocked and ready
mid-raise of clawed gauntlet with violet lightning crackling between blackened fingertips
mid-rise from obsidian throne with fangs bared and velvet cloak spilling down steps
mid-reload of hand-cannon with blessed powder-charge, boot pinning down twitching corpse
mid-draw of ancestral longsword from back-sheath, blade igniting with blue flame
approaching through nave colonnade with burning torch raised and runed machete drawn low
kneeling beside eviscerated gargoyle examining claw-marks, silver dagger reversed in grip
mid-thrust of consecrated rapier through swirling fog, greatcoat snapping with momentum
mid-drink from jeweled chalice with blood trailing down alabaster chin, eyes glowing amber
mid-stake driven through ribcage with both hands, knee braced against marble sarcophagus-edge
mid-overhead cleave with spiked war-axe cracking cathedral floor, rubble exploding outward beneath impact
striding across rain-slick bridge with chained flail dragging sparks, thunderclouds churning overhead behind
balanced on iron fence-spikes scanning moonlit courtyard below, twin pistols crossed at chest
mid-command with outstretched palm, spectral wolves materializing from shadow pooling at boots
mid-lunge from balcony edge with fangs extended and fingers hooked into claws, cape streaming
mid-ignition of oil-lantern with flint-snap, flame illuminating crypt entrance and skeletal remains
mid-slash with serrated saber through fog-bank, leather duster spinning with rotational force
stepping over crumbled gargoyle statue with blessed rifle shouldered, hunter's gaze fixed forward
perched on cathedral buttress with spyglass raised, scanning distant castle spires through storm
mid-pour of sanctified oil onto chainblade teeth, vapor rising as blessed liquid contacts metal
mid-turn from shattered stained-glass window with ancient disdain, ornate cane-sword partially unsheathed
just withdrawn from victim's neck wiping crimson from mouth with leather-gloved knuckles, eyes blazing
mid-leap from chapel roofline with barbed whip coiled back for strike, coat billowing upward
